title: ChainTrace Proof
description: A minimal proof object for anchoring evidence hashes and references.

proofType.description: Type of proof, such as product, shipment, invoice, inspection, delivery, or acceptance.

fileHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the evidence file or canonical evidence payload.

uri.description: Optional URI or CID pointing to off-chain evidence.

submitter.description: Address, DID, or identifier of the submitting actor.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp for proof creation or anchoring.

batchId.description: Optional batch, shipment, order, or trade object identifier.

metadataHash.description: Optional hash of private or extended metadata.

signature.description: Optional signature by the submitting actor.
